data.name: Love Vibe: Aria
data.detailed_description:
Wouldn't it be great to be in love with a mesmerizing girl? Jump into this exciting experience and enjoy time with your girlfriend Aria, a stunning girl with a beauty that makes men stop in their tracks. After a long day at work, Aria is waiting for you with naughty surprises...

Aria will hypnotize you with her charm, relax, and watch her dance for you. Later, join her in the bedroom, go with her to the beach, to the hotel room, or VIP party room, for some extra sexy action. You can change Aria’s clothes and customize her whole look. Change hair color, eye color, skin tone, choose lipstick, and eye makeup. Enjoy different combinations. Get carried away and let your dreams come true!

Features:

  • Admire your beloved girlfriend Aria and enjoy time with her like she is a real person.
  • Variety of sex poses.
  • High-quality 3d model with realistic facial expressions and voice acting.
  • Customize Aria’s appearance with a collection of different outfits, change hair and eye color, choose lipstick and eye makeup. Devil Aria? Goth Aria? Blonde Aria? This and so many more combinations are all possible! Make Aria look like a girl from your dreams!
  • Very natural movements achieved with motion capture technology.
  • You will notice that her skin is smooth and looks very realistic thanks to custom skin solution, now with 6 different skin tone's for greater customization.
  • Have sex with Aria in detailed, carefully crafted environments - go to her bedroom, take her to the beach, visit a hotel room, go to the VIP party room, or simple neon room.
  • Craft your game style with 11 different post-processing presets.

data.short_description: Wouldn't it be great to be in love with a mesmerizing girl? Jump into this exciting experience and enjoy time with your girlfriend Aria. She will hypnotize you with her charm. Relax and let her surprise you.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, Windows 8.1 or Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel® i5-4590 equivalent or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce® GTX 970, AMD Radeon™ R9 290 equivalent or better
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR

pc_requirements.minimum:
